statements.status_notes: See CVE-2026-33870 entry on netty-codec-http. Mirrored for sibling transport artifact so scanners receive the same not_affected statement.
statements.impact_statement: Scanner over-match: same root assessment as netty-codec-http (see above). netty-transport-classes-kqueue provides macOS/BSD kqueue(2) native transport classes — no HTTP parser code. CPE-based propagation only.

statements.status_notes: See CVE-2026-33871 entry on netty-codec-http2. Mirrored for sibling transport artifact.
statements.impact_statement: Scanner over-match: same root assessment as netty-codec-http2 (see above). netty-transport-classes-kqueue is the macOS/BSD kqueue native transport — no HTTP/2 frame decoder. CPE-based propagation only.
